entries.reason: Inventory collection has no mutation path.
HA/DRS writes need read-back oracle and audit ledger before automation.
VM power, migration and delete operations can be irreversible or disruptive.
Current scope is advisory evaluation only; console mutation is not allowed.
Current scope is advisory evaluation only; policy mutation is not allowed.
Agent rollout can affect endpoints and requires a field-verified recipe.
Response actions can isolate or block assets.
